intro: Pleurothallis longerepens is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its long, narrow leaves and delicate white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its reported health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
